page_metadata.biotools__summary: CancerCSP (clear cell renal cancer stage prediction) is a web-bench developed for predicting Early and Late stage of clear cell renal cell carcinoma (ccRCC) patients using gene expression data derived from RNA-seq experiments in the form of RNA-Seq by Expectation Maximization (RSEM) values.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CancerCSP (clear cell renal cancer stage prediction) is a web-bench developed for predicting Early and Late stage of clear cell renal cell carcinoma (ccRCC) patients using gene expression data derived from RNA-seq experiments in the form of RNA-Seq by Expectation Maximization (RSEM) values.
